specialEffect.title: Dash Detonation
specialEffect.descriptionEffect:
On-ability use: After using a dash ability, release an energy burst at the end of the dash that deals [150 + 100% [armor]] [md] to the nearest enemy within 4 meters.
[cd] 10 sec.

records.name: Modular Glove
records.description: Reinforced glove which protects the wearer, while adding strength. With this, you can break walls or epically drown in lava.

records.name: Battle Sleeve
records.description: Military grade tech. Used by elite storm troopers. Dramatically increases your chance of winning in a serious fight. Or in arm-wrestling.

records.name: Blood Honey
records.description: Incredibly rare find. Innumerable applications. Top tip: as soon as you find it, vacate the vicinity at speed.

records.name: Thermium Liquidum
records.description: Store in a cool place. Otherwise, it'll kind of melt itself and... you. Absolutely essential when doing experiments with radiation. As you do.

records.name: Recipe Construction
records.descriptionEffect:
Recipes are used for crafting and synthesizing the corresponding item.
Common recipes are always used for crafting and synthesizing the item.
Uncommon, Rare, and Epic recipes are only used in the Synthesis machine, and they are added to all other ingredients specified in the recipe, allowing you to increase the rarity of the item.
